subject: (no subject)
body:
hope you are well. photos look good. fyi I receive many calls a week about both Donald (███████████████, beauty contest. mara lago etc) and clinton from reporters. less so recently with clinton , but my answers are always i have nothing to say. or i try to ignore altogether. A few times i have been ambushed on the street with questions. but am more careful now

---
